title: Support direct packed arrays of struct and enums and packed arrays of scoped types

features.name: packed struct array declaration without typedef
features.description: Code should include a struct declaration with 'packed' keyword directly followed by array dimensions without an intermediate typedef

features.name: packed array of scoped type with scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a packed array declaration using a scoped type identifier with '::' scope resolution operator as the base type
